task_completion.description: Verify that the three required facilities are created in CAMEO Data Manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a list or individual records for 'Westside Cold Storage', 'Eastside Water Treatment', and 'Northside Ice & Fuel' within the CAMEO Data Manager interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct latitude and longitude coordinates are entered for the facilities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the facility details or map location screens showing the specific coordinates entered (e.g., 34.0522, -118.2437 for Westside Cold Storage).

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct chemicals are added to the chemical inventory of each facility.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the chemical inventory screens showing 'Anhydrous Ammonia' (CAS: 7664-41-7) added to Westside and Northside, and 'Chlorine' (CAS: 7782-50-5) added to Eastside.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent filters or selects only the facilities storing Anhydrous Ammonia for the map export.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a search, filter, or selection screen where only 'Westside Cold Storage' and 'Northside Ice & Fuel' are selected, or 'Eastside Water Treatment' is explicitly excluded before mapping.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent initiates the KML map export process in CAMEO Data Manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a map export dialog, KML generation menu, or mapping tool being used within the CAMEO Data Manager application.

task_completion.description: Verify that the KML file is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of a 'Save As' dialog or File Explorer window showing 'ammonia_map.kml' being saved in or existing in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the CAMEO Data Manager graphical interface to input data and generate the map.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the CAMEO Data Manager application being actively used to enter data, rather than a terminal or script editor.

integrity.description: Verify the KML file was exported by the software, not manually written.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save dialog should originate from CAMEO Data Manager. There should be no evidence of a text editor (like Notepad or VS Code) being used to manually write KML code.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running commands (like echo, cat, or python scripts) to directly create the 'ammonia_map.kml' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: CAMEO Data Manager 4.5.1 should be used. Facilities and coordinates: Westside Cold Storage (34.0522, -118.2437), Eastside Water Treatment (34.0953, -118.2801), Northside Ice & Fuel (34.1490, -118.3490). Chemicals: Anhydrous Ammonia (CAS 7664-41-7) at Westside and Northside; Chlorine (CAS 7782-50-5) at Eastside. The final KML map must be saved to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\ammonia_map.kml and should only include the two facilities storing Anhydrous Ammonia (Westside and Northside).
